{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322194034120FD1D88F034163954C"}"},"total":86},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611424639430099736","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有趣的日常书，文笔尚可"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772176550,"group_id":"7538712471763176472","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9pznYAZt8EsEzjR7G5FQxKEhHK5R+EoSE0E1n7ok26W","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3169246763558974","user_name":"用户31692467"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3169246763558974","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7538712471763176472","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】【不开后宫，不无脑】【不发癫】【基本不乐子人】【评分刚出还在涨】
（前期鬼灭JOJO）（入日常：new game，蜡笔小新，幸运星，俺物语，春物，路人女主……）（想看日常直接去第二卷）
龙钢，阿尔宙斯钦定的时空神，集帝牙卢卡与帕路奇亚的伟力于一身，作为神也作为人，他只想好好的走完自己人生的旅途。
蝴蝶忍：“龙钢先生是帮助我们杀死无惨的功臣。”
卡兹：“那家伙有着超乎常理的力量，行事作风却傻兮兮的。”
花京院典明：“龙钢先生是个值得尊敬的人。”
户冢彩加：“龙钢先生好像什么问题都能解决，让人觉得安心。”
风间彻：“我长大会成为像龙钢哥哥那样的精英人士。”
山田凉：“老板再借我点钱。”
他是别人口中的好人，是被憧憬的对象，是会被人写进日记中的角色。
不过，龙钢却从来不活在别人的眼中，在他的旅途到达终点之前，他的故事依旧不断延伸。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/99930161786cb552a5da4254a363d7d6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"老鸣翁","author_id":"","book_id":"7538712471763176472","book_name":"开局时空神，我把卡兹带回地球","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":859,"name":"宝可梦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=859&name=宝可梦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538712503467917848","read_count":"10657","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"343105"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"147","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,宝可梦,轻小说,系统,穿越,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/15aaf956f1307bb1cae7dd31ce2ffc3c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363634&x-signature=UVHJPp1%2BiRGxV4vgvUseWO1jnRA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3118685958970574","extra":{"comment_jum
